mapper.select: select id, title, content, cover_img, category_id, user_id, status, audit_reason, is_top, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, create_time, update_time from content where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc

select id, title, content, cover_img, category_id, user_id, status, audit_reason, is_top, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, create_time, update_time from content where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into content (title, content, cover_img, category_id, user_id, status, audit_reason, is_top, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, create_time, update_time) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{coverImg}, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{auditReason}, #{isTop}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{commentCount}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update content set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, cover_img = #{coverImg}, category_id = #{categoryId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, title, content, cover_img, category_id, user_id, status, audit_reason, is_top, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, create_time, update_time from content where status = 0 order by create_time asc
mapper.update: update content set status = #{status}, audit_reason = #{auditReason}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
